component_policy.nominal_intervention_policy: plant_intervenor is present only as an inactive legacy GraphSpec compatibility component; no robust/minimax adversary is scheduled.

fidelity_status.exact_objective_terms_scope: true for the implemented training scalar when plant_backend='cs_lss': the loss evaluates canonical C&S delay-augmented Q_t, R_t, and Q_f on the exposed LinearStateSpace state and command history

objective_fidelity.selection_policy: rollout validation loss uses the same full analytical Q/R/Q_f training scalar; analytical action and I/O metrics remain audit-only

fidelity_status.stochastic_projection: Feedbax GRU rollout uses C&S-shaped sensory, command, signal-dependent, and plant/load force noise channels without feeding the 48D delay-augmented analytical state to the GRU.
fidelity_status.temporary_stochastic_bridge: temporary RLRMP LSS wrapper implements sensory Channel, additive and signal-dependent motor Channel, and sampled physical-process mechanics.epsilon; future Feedbax acausal/ODE plant support should subsume this wrapper

cost.feedbax_force_filter_state_cost_note: Full analytical Q/R/Q_f loss scores force/filter and disturbance-integrator state through the canonical delay-augmented C&S Q_t and Q_f matrices.
cost.schedule: C&S Eq. 15 physical 8-state schedule with 5-step delay distribution

game_card.gamma_usage: Recorded for C&S provenance only. This nominal run has no robust/minimax adversarial phase and does not claim a certificate pass.

plant.bw_contract: top physical 8x8 block is identity; lag rows are zero

target_stream.reason: fixed-target C&S GRU does not consume a target-position stream

control_r.source: canonical C&S schedule.R on intended controller command before efferent/motor-channel noise

state_basis.coordinate_transform: absolute Feedbax position entries are converted to target-centred analytical coordinates before applying Q_t and Q_f

time_indexing.running_state: trial init plus rollout states[:-1], paired with commands

model_summary.certificate_claim: I/O map certificate framing only; the output-feedback GRU is not fed the 48D delay-augmented analytical state and is not claimed to share same-coordinate gains with the analytical controller.

efferent.noise_timing: Feedbax efferent Channel immediately before LinearStateSpace.force

feedback.noise_timing: Feedbax sensory Channel after 4D delayed LSS feedback selector

plant_process.epsilon_bridge: sampled physical-process/load epsilon Task input bound to C&S LinearStateSpace mechanics.epsilon using the physical block of the released C&S process covariance

projection_notes.additive_motor: Project C&S input-image motor covariance to command-channel additive noise with std sqrt(motor_covariance_scale).
projection_notes.plant_process: Project C&S process/load covariance to independent force noise immediately upstream of mechanics, after the force filter.
projection_notes.sensory: Use the C&S sensory covariance diagonal standard deviation on the Feedbax delayed pos/vel feedback channel.
projection_notes.signal_dependent_motor: Use the C&S Csdn scale as Feedbax pre-force-filter multiplicative command noise.
projection_notes.state_diffusion: No arbitrary full-state diffusion is used in Feedbax GRU rollout.

stochastic_runtime.command_runtime: Feedbax efferent Channel immediately before LinearStateSpace.force; additive and signal-dependent motor noise are both command-channel noise
stochastic_runtime.plant_process_runtime: Task-sampled physical-process/load epsilon bound to LinearStateSpace.epsilon
stochastic_runtime.sensory_runtime: Feedbax sensory Channel after the 4D delayed LSS feedback selector; the delay itself is represented by the C&S 48D LSS state

training_diagnostics.source: optimizer_state plus Feedbax TaskTrainer history; no raw gradients, batches, or activations are persisted

projection_notes.additive_motor: Project C&S input-image motor covariance to command-channel additive noise with std sqrt(motor_covariance_scale).
projection_notes.plant_process: Project C&S process/load covariance to independent force noise immediately upstream of mechanics, after the force filter.
projection_notes.sensory: Use the C&S sensory covariance diagonal standard deviation on the Feedbax delayed pos/vel feedback channel.
projection_notes.signal_dependent_motor: Use the C&S Csdn scale as Feedbax pre-force-filter multiplicative command noise.
projection_notes.state_diffusion: No arbitrary full-state diffusion is used in Feedbax GRU rollout.

task_timing.coordinate_contract: Feedbax SimpleReaches supplies mechanics.effector.pos targets in the same Cartesian metre coordinates as the point-mass effector state.
task_timing.time_axis_contract: Hold-free fixed nominal task: Feedbax n_steps=61 yields exactly 60 transition/control-cost stages and one position target per transition; delayed-reach epoch masks are not used.

training_diagnostics.source: optimizer_state plus Feedbax TaskTrainer history; no raw gradients, batches, or activations are persisted

projection_notes.additive_motor: Project C&S input-image motor covariance to command-channel additive noise with std sqrt(motor_covariance_scale).
projection_notes.plant_process: Project C&S process/load covariance to independent force noise immediately upstream of mechanics, after the force filter.
projection_notes.sensory: Use the C&S sensory covariance diagonal standard deviation on the Feedbax delayed pos/vel feedback channel.
projection_notes.signal_dependent_motor: Use the C&S Csdn scale as Feedbax pre-force-filter multiplicative command noise.
projection_notes.state_diffusion: No arbitrary full-state diffusion is used in Feedbax GRU rollout.

stochastic_runtime.command_runtime: Feedbax efferent Channel immediately before LinearStateSpace.force; additive and signal-dependent motor noise are both command-channel noise
stochastic_runtime.plant_process_runtime: Task-sampled physical-process/load epsilon bound to LinearStateSpace.epsilon
stochastic_runtime.sensory_runtime: Feedbax sensory Channel after the 4D delayed LSS feedback selector; the delay itself is represented by the C&S 48D LSS state

training_diagnostics.source: optimizer_state plus Feedbax TaskTrainer history; no raw gradients, batches, or activations are persisted

validation_bins.selection_role: rollout loss over original-anchor, seen-target, held-out-target, and perturbation-emphasis bins selects checkpoints; analytical action and I/O metrics remain audit-only
rollout loss over original-anchor, seen-target, held-out-target, and perturbation-emphasis bins selects checkpoints; analytical action and I/O metrics remain audit-only
